facebook_drama_realtime_pool.description: Night realtime-rank pool. External Guangdada realtime materials are consumed first and split by ffmpeg.

facebook_drama_ordinary_pool.description: Ordinary official short-drama pool. Uses official Beidou tasks and the ai-cut chain.

facebook_drama_fbhot_test_pool.description: Facebook hot-weighted experiment pool. Uses official Beidou dramas with local ffmpeg segmentation.

facebook_drama_creative_list_pool.description: Night Guangdada creative-list mapping pool. Uses Beidou titles to query Guangdada external mp4 and publishes with real Beidou task links/copy.

facebook_drama_creative_list_day_pool.description: Daytime Guangdada creative-list mapping pool. Same mapping logic as the night line, but intended for manual daytime runs.

facebook_drama_realtime_day_pool.description: Daytime realtime-rank pool. Uses the same realtime external-material workflow under manual daytime control.

facebook_drama_realtime_single_pool.description: Night realtime-single pool. One realtime drama stays on one account until its prepared segments are exhausted.

facebook_drama_yourchannel_pool.description: YourChannel dedicated pool. Uses the allowlist title workflow against the official yourchannel_drama theater and publishes with real received tasks.

facebook_drama_reserve_pool.description: Reserve Facebook short-drama pool. Contains the remaining active accounts that are not currently assigned to any execution line.

facebook_drama_exception_pool.description: Temporary holding pool for accounts that are repeatedly blocked by platform-side publish restrictions and need manual review.

facebook_novel_dedicated_10.description: Dedicated Facebook pool for novel-video publishing.
